categories.routeNotes: Only monitor public portals, email notices, or manually supplied opportunities. Human must review eligibility before any response.
Do not claim HIPAA, specimen, hazmat, or controlled-substance authority unless verified in current compliance records.
Verify cargo value, dimensions, loading equipment, and operating authority before quoting.
Best fit for smart hands, retail rollout, POS, printer, camera, and low-voltage service calls.
Referral sales require consent, source-term review, and partner acceptance before sharing lead details.
Fallback category for manually reviewed local service leads.
